g.title: query.expression:left_operand->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (left_operand) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.expression:parent_expr->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent_expr) REFERENCES query.expression(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.expression:right_operand->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (right_operand) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.expression:subquery->query.stored_query:id

g.title: query.expression:function_id->query.function_sig:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (function_id) REFERENCES query.function_sig(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.expression:cast_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (cast_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.expression:bind_variable->query.bind_variable:name
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bind_variable) REFERENCES query.bind_variable(name) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.case_branch:condition->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (condition) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.case_branch:parent_expr->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent_expr) REFERENCES query.expression(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.case_branch:result->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (result) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.from_relation:on_clause->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (on_clause) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.order_by_item:expression->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (expression) REFERENCES query.expression(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.select_item:expression->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (expression) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.stored_query:having_clause->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (having_clause) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.stored_query:limit_count->query.expression:id

g.title: query.stored_query:where_clause->query.expression:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (where_clause) REFERENCES query.expression(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
